SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2009 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO APR-22-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. DEFENDANT TO PAY JUDGMENT CREDITOR $5,000.00 ON DEC. 23, 2009 AND $300 PER MONTH THEREAFTER STARTING JANUARY 1, 2010 UNTIL FULLY PAID. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT ELINOR HILL-COURTNEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY DELIVER TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR ANY AND ALL FUNDS HELD BY ALAN TABOR, ESQ. AND/OR ROBERT HILL FOR OR ON BEHALF OF ELINOR HILL-COURTNEY. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS ORDERED NOT TO DISBURSE OR TRANSFER ANY FUNDS HELD BY MR. TABOR OR MR. HILL UNTIL THIS DEBT IS FULLY SATISFIED.
